title: dactylorhiza × perez-chiscanoi
intro: Dactylorhiza × perez-chiscanoi is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza sambucina and Dactylorhiza coccinea. This plant is valued for its potential medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × perez-chiscanoi include its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Dactylorhiza × perez-chiscanoi can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or dried extracts, which can be consumed as teas or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
